name: Fran
description: The best-known CrossFit benchmark: a 21-15-9 couplet of thrusters and pull-ups, prized for being short, simple to understand, and brutally unforgiving of an overly aggressive early pace.
source_notes: crossfit.com/faq/wod (official CrossFit FAQ, 'Explain The Workouts with Names (the Girls)?'), retrieved 2026-07-08
